ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of main cast members (JSON format) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's movie preferences (JSON format) */,
  "watch_history" TEXT /* User's watch history (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review text */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence in the recommendation (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user viewed the recommendation */,
  "clicked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user clicked on the recommended movie */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, editorial, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
